prompt: I need my 2025 capital gains report as a PDF for my accountant. Save it to ~/Desktop/capital-gains-2025.pdf. I'm already set up with wallets synced and journals processed.

assertions.text: Uses the full 2025 calendar year (Jan 1 to Dec 31)
Does not manually parse or display raw millisatoshi values from JSON — amounts are either handled by CLI formatting or a rendering tool
The workflow would succeed without the user needing to install dependencies, write code, or intervene manually
Gets the job done in a clean, straightforward workflow (not a multi-step workaround with temp files and cleanup)
